task_completion.description: Survey created with correct title and anonymized responses enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'PHQ-9 Mental Health Screening Study 2024' in the top header or survey list. In the survey settings or participant settings, 'Anonymized responses' must be set to 'On' or 'Yes'.
Look at the survey structure tree (usually on the left sidebar) or the group list. It must show exactly three groups: 'Symptom Frequency', 'Functional Impact', and 'Demographics'.

task_completion.description: Mandatory Array question with 9 items and 4-point scale in Symptom Frequency group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question preview or editor in the 'Symptom Frequency' group. It must be an Array type question, marked as mandatory (often a red asterisk), containing 9 subquestions (rows), and 4 answer options (columns): 'Not at all', 'Several days', 'More than half the days', 'Nearly every day'.

task_completion.description: Short-text question in Functional Impact group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question preview or editor in the 'Functional Impact' group. It must be a 'Short free text' (or similar text input) question asking about interference with daily functioning.

task_completion.description: Radio-button questions for age and sex in Demographics group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for question previews or editors in the 'Demographics' group. There must be 'List (Radio)' type questions for age (options: Under 18, 18-24, 25-34, 35-44, 45-54, 55-64, 65 and older) and sex (options: Male, Female, Prefer not to say, Prefer to self-describe).
Look for the survey overview page showing a green 'Active' status badge, a 'Stop this survey' button, or a success message indicating the survey has been activated for data collection.

integrity.description: Agent used the LimeSurvey web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface (http://localhost/index.php/admin), not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual LimeSurvey application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard LimeSurvey menus, sidebars, and styling, rather than a mocked HTML page or a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI using database clients
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or other database tools being used to insert the survey data directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey must be titled 'PHQ-9 Mental Health Screening Study 2024' and have anonymized responses enabled. It requires exactly 3 question groups: 'Symptom Frequency', 'Functional Impact', and 'Demographics'. The 'Symptom Frequency' group must contain a mandatory Array-type question with 9 subquestions (the PHQ-9 items) and a 4-point scale. The survey must be activated at the end.
